observation_markers.pattern: return [f"Changed file outside allowed_paths: {changed}" for changed in changed_files]

runtime_markers.pattern: "semantic_boundary_principle": "Promotion is normalization into a reviewable proposal contract, not a folder move."

observation_markers.pattern:
report = validate_transition_packet_file(
            Path(validate_transition_packet_path),
            validator_profile=transition_profile,
        )
        emit_supervisor_json(report, output_mode=normalized_output_mode)

runtime_markers.pattern: Treat graph topology as already represented by metadata
Do not materialize a child whose main purpose is to verbalize topology

validation_markers.pattern: Do not make topology self-description the main spec prose
Do not materialize a child whose main purpose is to verbalize topology

observation_markers.pattern: reflective/proposal branch starts moving toward domain-first
When addressing actionable PR review threads, treat review feedback as process evidence
